sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48576" key="qew=3" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεῶ</orth>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεάου</foreign>, imper. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεάομαι</foreign>, <sense id="n48576.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">behold!</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
